name: Energy Vertical Forecast
status: Shipped: resource-loaded Gantt (fluid slide/resize, resizable Project/role column), signed-vs-forecast stacked demand chart (green committed floor + likelihood-opacity forecast), multi-year utilization horizon, active-horizon Expected/Planned utilization + a Capacity (demand-vs-capacity-by-role) view, per-capita pull-through revenue split, and a cost & margin layer that is HIDDEN BY DEFAULT (opt-in toggle; wires the per-person costRate into oppCost / marginTotals / per-person+role margin). Data accuracy is build-gated by 54 hand-computed golden tests (tsc + vitest + vite build). Collaboration via a consolidated public/data/dataset.json read at runtime + per-file (roster/opportunity) store for a OneDrive-synced SharePoint shared folder. Hosting target = PUBLIC GitLab Pages at git.epam.com (.gitlab-ci.yml ready) — BLOCKED on creating the git.epam.com project; GitHub is a private mirror only. World-class UX/logic audit landed (undo toast, cross-project over-capacity rings, wheel-guards, focus-trap, no-reflow toolbars/tabs). Excel-import template + wizard in progress.
goals: Forecast weekly FTE across presales opportunities on a resource-loaded Gantt
Weight demand by funnel stage (close %) and split Energy team vs Delivery team
Surface energy-team utilization and pull-through revenue (deal value x close %) + signed bookings
Collaborate async via a git repo store (public/data), one JSON file per opportunity

tokenBurn.basis: estimate — initial build 2026-07-09 (~3.0M) + extended session 2026-07-15 (~3.0M: forecast-model + chart rework, multi-year horizon, collaboration/hosting, world-class UX audit, utilization/capacity redesign, revenue split, cost & margin) (claude-opus-4-8); not metered. Per-session ledger: ORBIT R-SYS-0265/0266/0268/0272 + R-SYS-0314..0327 (latest cost & margin R-SYS-0327 / TB-000152).
